purpose: Rerun Phase 17 TinyImageNet scale-up under manifest gate. The original bypass-era result (phase17_tinyimagenet__20260523T144752Z) was quarantined after the RAIL 3 autonomous-mode bypass was closed. This manifest authorises the clean rerun.

experiments.name: Phase 17 TinyImageNet scale-up rerun (TCL vs EWC vs SGD, 3 seeds)
experiments.notes: ResNet-18, Split-TinyImageNet task_incremental, 40 epochs/task, batch_size=64, 3 seeds. Replaces quarantined bypass-era result. See manifests/provenance/bypass_window_audit_20260523.md.
